blocks.content: Congratulations on completing this journey! Job well done!

We hope you've enjoyed traveling with us as you:

- Learned why it's important to use PDC when connecting Grafana Cloud to an external data source
- Installed the PDC binaries on a Linux or Windows machine
- Learned how to deploy the PDC agent on Kubernetes or Docker

---

### Related paths

Consider taking the following paths after you complete this journey.

- [Connect to a Prometheus data source in Grafana Cloud](/docs/learning-paths/prometheus/)
- [Visualize CSV data using the Infinity data source](/docs/learning-paths/infinity-csv/)
- [Visualize JSON data using the Infinity data source](/docs/learning-paths/infinity-json/)
